title: Treatment of rotavirus - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of rotavirus
Learn how rotavirus is diagnosed and treated.

## How to  diagnose rotavirus
Rotavirus is diagnosed  based on your  symptoms and laboratory tests.

## How to treat rotavirus
There is no specific treatment for rotavirus. To prevent dehydration, the main treatment is oral rehydration therapy (drinking a mixture of clean water, salts and sugars).
